name: research-codex
description: Persistent project-scoped store for deep research findings with progressive disclosure and contrarian-pass investigation.

interface.shortDescription: Project-scoped persistent research memory for Codex
interface.longDescription: Stores deep research findings under .research/, recalls them through an INDEX.md dispatcher, and refreshes stale topics with sourced investigation.
defaultPrompt: Use /research <topic> to recall or refresh project research.
